title: ononis pendula var. tetuanensis
intro: Ononis pendula var. tetuanensis, also known as Spurage or Bitter Sweet, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to Africa and the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as an anti-diarrheal agent. Ononis pendula var. tetuanensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
